name: Guard Penguin
desc: When you take damage from a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, gain LP equal to the damage you took.
mnst_eff: When you take damage from a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, gain LP equal to the damage you took.
eff: When you take damage from a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, gain LP equal to the damage you took.

action: Activates if you take effect damage
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
